class.name: my_controller/MyController
class.description: A minimal joint-level controller skeleton. Claims effort command interfaces and reads joint position/velocity state interfaces.

class.name: my_controller/ImpedanceController
class.description: A CRISP Cartesian impedance controller wrapper. It accepts a full end-effector target pose on target_pose, including position and orientation, and uses task k/d parameters for Cartesian impedance.
